HORNER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CRC 2.551. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: TROON PACIFIC, INC.'S MOTION TO SEAL PORTIONS OF MOTION OF DONNETTE CLARENS TO AMEND JUDGMENT AND DECLARATION OF STEPHEN A. HORNER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CRC 2.551 WAS WITHDRAWN AND THEREFORE THE REDACTED INFORMATION WAS NOT USED TO RENDER A RULING. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION TO SEAL AND ORDERS THE RECORDS SEALED BECAUSE THE CLERK CANNOT DELETE THE FILING. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

Troon Pacific, Inc.'s motion to seal Portions Of Motion Of Donnette Clarens to amend Judgment And Declaration Of Stephen A. Horner In Support Of Motion To Amend Judgment Pursuant To Crc 2.551.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: TROON PACIFIC, INC.'s Motion To Seal Portions of Donnette Clarens' motion to amend Judgment Pursuant To Crc 2.551 was withdrawn and therefore the redacted information was not used to render a ruling. The court grants the motion to seal and orders the records sealed because the clerk cannot delete the filing.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
